heading: Withdrawal of notice given and modification of applications and contracts made prior toFebruary 13, 1911
label: 468 Withdrawal of notice given and modification of applications and contracts made prior toFebruary 13, 1911
text: The Secretary of the Interior may, in his discretion, withdraw any public notice issued prior to , under , and he may agree to such modification of water-right applications duly filed prior to , or contracts with water users’ associations and others, entered into prior to , as he may deem advisable, or he may consent to the abrogation of such water-right applications and contracts, and proceed in all respects as if no such notice has been given.February 13, 1911February 13, 1911February 13, 1911section 419 of this title
